meta.title: Threat Hunting With What You Have
meta.description: Ben Goerz of Kimberly-Clark begins by explaining what threat hunting is and why it is important. Then he shows how you don't need to buy some new product to do threat hunting. There is a lot of information already available on your ICS and enterprise. He shows multiple examples of how looking at DNS, proxy logs, and firewall logs can be used in threat hunting to identify threats. New threat hunting tools show promise, but don't ignore the tools you already have from your deployed systems.
